_instructions: Define reorder point parameters for each site and item. The default_policy applies unless overridden. Site and item overrides allow fine-grained control.
_math_reference: Min reorder point (s) = NORM.INV(CSL, mean_demand_over_lead_time, sqrt(mean_demand_over_lead_time)). Max reorder point (S) = MAX(NORM.INV(CSL, mean_demand_over_lead_time_plus_review, sqrt(...)), s + MOQ)

default_policy.description: Default: weekly review, 95% service level, no minimum order constraint

site_policies._instructions: Add entries here to override the default policy for specific depots or sites.
site_policies.site_id: TODO: depot_id or site_id from supply_network.json
site_policies.description: TODO: explain why this site has a different policy

parameter_definitions.review_period_days: Number of days between stock reviews. Shorter = tighter safety stocks, more frequent monitoring.
parameter_definitions.cycle_service_level: Target probability of meeting demand without stockout during a replenishment cycle. Range: 0.70–0.99.
parameter_definitions.moq: Minimum Order Quantity. Reorder point adjusted upward to respect this constraint.
parameter_definitions.pack_multiple: Packaging multiplier. Reserved for future use.
parameter_definitions.lead_time_days: Sourced from supply_network.json shipping_lanes. Time from order placement to receipt at site.
